title: Admin Drain via Missing Signer Verification
summary: The admin_withdraw instruction accepts any pubkey as the admin field without verifying it signed the transaction. An attacker submits a transaction with their own wallet as the admin parameter and drains the entire vault.

transaction_fee.note: Single transaction, no capital at risk for attacker

attack_accounts.note: No initial capital required - exploit steals from vault

complexity.explanation: Exploit is mechanically trivial - one unsigned transaction with attacker-supplied admin parameter

notes: No special privileges, hardware, or timing required
Can be executed 24/7 - no dependencies on market conditions
Transaction fails if vault is empty (safe to retry)
Audit tools catch this pattern automatically (Rule 8)
Exploit tx looks identical to legitimate admin_withdraw tx

preconditions: Attacker knows program ID (public on Solana)
Attacker knows vault account address (public via getProgramAccounts)

accounts.name: vault
accounts.note: Vault account holding funds to drain

accounts.name: admin
accounts.note: CRITICAL: Attacker supplies their own pubkey - NOT a signer. Anchor does not enforce Signer<'info> constraint.

accounts.name: destination
accounts.note: Attacker-controlled account to receive drained funds

data.note: Full vault balance minus rent-exempt minimum (~0.001 SOL)

tx_replay.note: Must use recent blockhash (<=150 slots old)

mechanics.root_cause: AccountInfo<'info> does not enforce signer verification. Anchor's Signer<'info> type is required for automatic enforcement.
mechanics.vulnerable_code: pub admin: AccountInfo<'info>  // No Signer constraint
mechanics.safe_code: pub admin: Signer<'info>  // Anchor enforces at deserialization
mechanics.anchor_behavior: Signer<'info> checks is_signer flag during account deserialization. AccountInfo<'info> performs no validation.
mechanics.solana_constraint: Solana transactions can include any pubkey in any account field. The is_signer flag is set per-account in the transaction message, not derived from the account's pubkey.

on_chain_signals: admin_withdraw called with admin != signer pubkey
Multiple failed attempts followed by success with non-authority admin
off_chain_signals: Vault balance dropping to rent-exempt minimum

remediation.immediate: Add Signer<'info> constraint to admin field
remediation.defense_in_depth: Add has_one = admin constraint on vault account
remediation.verification: Transaction must fail if admin pubkey does not match the signer's pubkey

related_exploits.name: Wormhole Bridge (2022)
related_exploits.similarity: Missing signer check on critical path

poc_verification.expected_behavior: Transaction should FAIL with error before fix, PASS after fix

test_accounts.admin: Must sign (will be enforced after fix)
